scripts.build:test-deps: pnpm --filter @wi/test-support build && pnpm --filter @wi/protocol build && pnpm --filter @wi/client-state build && pnpm --filter @wi/provider-contract build && pnpm --filter @wi/tools build && pnpm --filter @wi/provider-fake build && pnpm --filter @wi/storage build && pnpm --filter @wi/harness-core build && pnpm --filter @wi/server build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm build:test-deps && tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm -r typecheck
scripts.test:unit: pnpm build:test-deps && vitest run --workspace vitest.workspace.ts --project unit
scripts.test:integration: pnpm build:test-deps && vitest run --workspace vitest.workspace.ts --project integration --passWithNoTests
scripts.test:property: pnpm build:test-deps && vitest run --workspace vitest.workspace.ts --project property --passWithNoTests
scripts.test:process: pnpm build:test-deps && vitest run --workspace vitest.workspace.ts --project process --passWithNoTests
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
